name: The Bunker at MR Golf Range
about: The Bunker at MR Golf Range is a golf facility that combines both a driving range and simulator rental services. The venue offers outdoor practice facilities with daily hours from 9am until dusk, weather permitting, alongside indoor simulator bays available for rent. Simulator rentals are priced at $30 per hour with a one-hour minimum requirement. The facility is located behind the new Mr Golf store and provides a straightforward, practical environment for golfers looking to practice or play indoors.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient simulator rental with flexible hours
Combined driving range and simulator options
Self-serve driving range with card and cash payment
Location behind the new Mr Golf store for easy access

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own clubs and they must be clean. Club rentals are not mentioned.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulator rental is $30/hour with a one-hour minimum, but specific time for 18 holes is not provided.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears family-friendly with event and party space available.
